news.title: How to watch the final of the FIFA Men’s World Cup on free-to-air television
news.lede: The final of the 2026 FIFA Men’s World Cup will be broadcast free-to-air by New Zealand’s TVNZ. Spain and Argentina will go head-to-head at the MetLife Stadium, in New Jersey, to complete the 104-match tournament co-hosted by the United States, Canada and Mexico. The match kicks off at 7am (NZT) on Monday July 20, 2026 (NZT). David Raya (Arsenal, England) 13.

news.title: France vs England: Why World Cup third-place play-off is huge for Three Lions boss Thomas Tuchel
news.lede: England are in the midst of a run of three matches against the top three sides in world football. Far from being a dead rubber, Saturday's third-place play-off against France has huge ramifications for how this World Cup will be remembered - and almost certainly for Thomas Tuchel's future. Let's be clear: the Football Association (FA) is still fully behind the England manager, and Tuchel said in the aftermath of the semi-final capitulation to Argentina that he is "100 per cent" committed to the role, up to and including the European Championships in 2028. But I have never before seen such an outpouring of criticism towards any England boss when the team has, on paper, had a largely successful World Cup.

news.title: 🎥 World Cup highlights: France & England in a 10-goal classic
news.lede: Expectations weren’t insanely high and the anticipation certainly wasn’t either — but this little final, the third-place match, whatever you want to call it, definitely proved us wrong. Because there really could be no talk of a dull, meaningless game between England and France. Here you can see all 10 (!!!) After a 0–4 humiliation by halftime, the French came damn close in the second half to pulling off a sensational comeback.

news.title: England World Cup ratings: Every Three Lions player who took part in the tournament rated
news.lede: England's World Cup campaign is officially over and while history has been made - it's not quite the history the Three Lions wanted. A stunning 6-4 win over France in the third-place play-off earned Thomas Tuchel's side a bronze medal - and England's best performance at a World Cup since the 1966 World Cup. France 4-6 England - report and reaction Nev: I have a big problem with Tuchel's DNA comments But it could have been more. England were leading their semi-final with Argentina with five minutes of normal time remaining before conceding twice to the holders and exiting in agonising fashion.

news.title: World Cup semifinals bracket: Full schedule, matchups and path to the final
news.lede: Forty-eight teams began the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Now only Spain and defending champion Argentina remain. The World Cup final is set after Spain delivered a commanding 2-0 semifinal victory over France and Argentina scored twice late to stun England 2-1. La Roja will meet Lionel Messi and La Albiceleste on Sunday at MetLife Stadium, where Spain will pursue its first title since 2010 and Argentina will try to become the first repeat champion since Brazil in 1962.

news.title: Four Observations from the World Cup third place match
news.lede: The third place match of this World Cup was something else. Four goals from England in the first half made it seem that we were not going to see a close game, but France had something to say about it. We saw records matched and overcome, and two key goals in the Golden Boot race. This was the highest scoring match in this edition of the tournament — surpassing Germany’s 7-1 win over Curacao.

news.title: Your guide to the FIFA World Cup final (and the razzmatazz that goes with it)
news.lede: The FIFA Men’s World Cup final has always been football’s biggest occasion. This year, it will also become the most ambitious entertainment event in the tournament’s history. Fans at Monday’s final (NZT) will see a full showbiz-centric programme before kick-off, a first-ever World Cup half-time show and the traditional trophy presentation that crowns the new world champions. The official closing ceremony will begin about 90 minutes before the match at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

news.title: Spain vs Argentina – Predicted lineup and team news
news.lede: The European champions, Spain, are set to face the Copa America champions, Argentina, in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final on Sunday at the New York-New Jersey Stadium. Spain head into this huge clash in outstanding, record-setting form, currently unbeaten in their last 37 matches. Their tactical discipline has been evident throughout the tournament, as they have comfortably dealt with top-level opponents. A solid 2-0 win over France in the semi-finals highlighted their dominance, and notably, La Roja have not fallen behind at any stage during this World Cup.
